channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260524)
item.description:
What's New

fix: Notion code block + Kiro CLI + dynamic dual tap + remote desktop inject

Several related fixes for Vietnamese input injection across Chromium-based

and remote desktop apps:

  1. Notion code block fix

- Switch to .slow + chunked text + low delays (12/25/12 ms). Chunked

text sends all chars in one CGEvent, avoiding per-char IME composition

state that broke subsequent BS.

- Telex sequences like "thuwr" → "thử" now work correctly inside Notion

code blocks.

  1. Dynamic dual event tap

- Always-active session-level secondary tap was interfering with synthetic

event delivery in Chromium-based apps (Notion code block, Kiro CLI).

The tap's mere presence at .headInsertEventTap altered timing/ordering.

- Make session tap creation lazy: install only while a remote desktop

client is frontmost (RustDesk/Jump/TeamViewer/etc), destroy when leaving.

Hooked via NSWorkspace.didActivateApplicationNotification on main queue.

- Single tap for 99% of users → no interference. Remote desktop typing

support preserved when actually needed.

  1. Remote desktop inject mode (experimental, opt-in)

- New Settings → Advanced → Remote Desktop toggle. Default OFF.

- When OFF: remote desktop apps stay in passthrough (existing behavior).

- When ON: XKey injects Vietnamese into the remote desktop client via

clipboard paste (Cmd+V default, Ctrl+V for RustDesk).

- Uses .combinedSessionState event source + explicit Cmd-down → V → Cmd-up

sequence for the paste path only (other paths keep .privateState).

- Works with Jump Desktop and similar clients (slow typing required).

RustDesk strict-checks HID modifier state — synthetic modifier stripped,

unsupported and documented in UI.

  1. Single source of truth for remote desktop bundle IDs

- New RemoteDesktopBundleIds.all in Shared/AppBehaviorDetector.swift.

- Consumed by both KeyboardEventHandler.passthroughApps and

EventTapManager dynamic tap logic. Old duplicated list removed.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
